---
title: "its2prof_heatmap"
format: html
theme: 
  light: zephyr
  dark: cyborg
toc: true
page-layout: full
number-sections: true
number-depth: 3
editor: visual
self-contained: true
---

# Load pkgs

```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse,
               cowplot,
               janitor)
```

# Load data

```{r}
# ITS2 type profile
its2_prof <- 
  read_tsv("../raw_data/20250829T091611/its2_type_profiles/4_first_analysis_20250829T091611.profiles.absolute.abund_and_meta.txt")

its2_prof_1 <- # tidy
  its2_prof |> 
  slice(-(1:5)) %>% # Remove first 5 rows (unnecessary rows)
  row_to_names(1) |>  # Move first row to column header
  rename(sample_name = 2) |>  # Name 2nd column
  select(-1) |>  # Remove first column (unneeded)
  drop_na() |> 
  type_convert() 

its2_prof_2 <- 
  its2_prof_1 |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(total = sum(c_across(A3:`1510`), na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  filter(total != 0)

sample_clean <- # samples with ITS2
  its2_prof_2 |> 
  pull(sample_name)

# Metadata
metadata <- 
  read_csv("metadata_all_clean.csv")

metadata_1 <- # clean meatdata
  metadata |> 
  filter(sample_name %in% sample_clean)

# Get manually renamed ITS2 type profiles
its2_rename <- 
  read_csv("../raw_data/Edited ITS2 type profile naming.csv") |> 
  rename(its2_prof = 1)

its2_arrangement <- 
  read_tsv("../its2prof_arrangement.txt",col_names = F) |> 
  pull(1)
```

# Tidy

```{r}
its2_prof_3 <- 
  its2_prof_2 |> 
  select(!total) |> 
  pivot_longer(!1,
               names_to = "its2_prof",
               values_to = "count") |> 
  left_join(metadata_1) |> 
  left_join(its2_rename) |> 
  select(!its2_prof) |> 
  rename(its2_prof = Edited) |>
  mutate(genus = str_extract(its2_prof, "[A-Za-z]+")) |> 
  group_by(corrected_id) |> 
  mutate(rel_abun = sqrt(count/sum(count)))

# All
its2_prof_plot <- 
  its2_prof_3 |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(corrected_id, region),
             y = fct_relevel(its2_prof, rev(its2_arrangement)),
             fill = rel_abun)) +
  geom_raster() +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(fct_relevel(species, c("Hpor",
                               "Hhip",
                               "Tgig",
                               "Tder",
                               "Tmax",
                               "Tnoa",
                               "Tsqu",
                               "Tcro"))),
             rows = vars(genus),
             space = "free",
             scale = "free") +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.05,'lines'),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  viridis::scale_fill_viridis(option = "cividis")

its2_prof_plot |> 
  ggsave(filename = "its2_prof_heatmap.svg", 
         dpi = 900,
         width = 15, 
         height = 10,
         unit = "cm")

# Region labels
its2_prof_plot_region_lab <- 
  its2_prof_3 |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(corrected_id, region),
             y = 1,
             fill = region)) + 
  geom_raster() +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(fct_relevel(species, c("Hpor",
                               "Hhip",
                               "Tgig",
                               "Tder",
                               "Tmax",
                               "Tnoa",
                               "Tsqu",
                               "Tcro"))),
             space = "free",
             scale = "free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = 
                       c("Ala"="#E41A1C",
                               "Ant"="#377EB8",
                               "ARN"="#4DAF4A",
                               "Bat"="#984EA3",
                               "Boh"="#FF7F00",
                               "Bol"="#FFFF33",
                               "Cal"="#A65628",
                               "Cam"="#F781BF",
                               "Pal"="#999999",
                               "Sam"="#66C2A5",
                               "Zam"="#FC8D62")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

its2_prof_plot_region_lab |> 
  ggsave(filename = "its2_prof_heatmap_region_labels.svg", 
         dpi = 900,
         width = 15, 
         height = 5,
         unit = "cm")

# Biogeographic region labels
its2_prof_plot_bio_region_lab <- 
  its2_prof_3 |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(corrected_id, region),
             y = 1,
             fill = bio_region)) + 
  geom_raster() +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(fct_relevel(species, c("Hpor",
                               "Hhip",
                               "Tgig",
                               "Tder",
                               "Tmax",
                               "Tnoa",
                               "Tsqu",
                               "Tcro"))),
             space = "free",
             scale = "free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("WPS"="#FDE725",
                               "SS"="#7AD151",
                               "VS"="#440154",
                               "NPS"="#414487",
                               "SPS"="#2A788E")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

its2_prof_plot_bio_region_lab |> 
  ggsave(filename = "its2_prof_heatmap_bio_region_labels.svg", 
         dpi = 900,
         width = 15, 
         height = 5,
         unit = "cm")

# Thermal regime labels
its2_prof_plot_thermal_cluster_lab <- 
  its2_prof_3 |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(corrected_id, region),
             y = 1,
             fill = thermal_cluster)) + 
  geom_raster() +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(fct_relevel(species, c("Hpor",
                               "Hhip",
                               "Tgig",
                               "Tder",
                               "Tmax",
                               "Tnoa",
                               "Tsqu",
                               "Tcro"))),
             space = "free",
             scale = "free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("D"="#fdd081",
                               "E"="#f99858",
                               "F"="#e34d34")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

its2_prof_plot_thermal_cluster_lab |> 
  ggsave(filename = "its2_prof_heatmap_thermal_cluster_labels.svg", 
         dpi = 900,
         width = 15, 
         height = 5,
         unit = "cm")
```

Add relative abundance of genus.

```{r}
its2_prof_4 <- 
  its2_prof_2 |> 
  select(!total) |> 
  pivot_longer(!1,
               names_to = "its2_prof",
               values_to = "count") |> 
  left_join(metadata_1) |> 
  left_join(its2_rename) |> 
  select(!its2_prof) |> 
  rename(its2_prof = Edited) |>
  mutate(genus = str_extract(its2_prof, "[A-Za-z]+")) |> 
  group_by(corrected_id, genus) |> 
  summarise(Total = sum(count)) |> 
  left_join(metadata_1)

its2_prof_4_p <- 
  its2_prof_4 |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(corrected_id, region),
             y = Total,
             fill = genus)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",
           position = "fill",
           width = 1.1) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(fct_relevel(species, c("Hpor",
                               "Hhip",
                               "Tgig",
                               "Tder",
                               "Tmax",
                               "Tnoa",
                               "Tsqu",
                               "Tcro"))),
             space = "free",
             scale = "free") +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.05,'lines'),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#746FB4", "#209E77", "#E7AB06"))

its2_prof_4_p |> 
  ggsave(filename = "genus_labels.svg", 
         dpi = 900,
         width = 15, 
         height = 5,
         unit = "cm")
```
